summary: Iteration 42: Tested TopBar final refinements - auto-sizing customer pill, grid-cols-2 DC/Site pills, rich summary bar with DC/Site mini-pills, target solution badges, Hybrid badge, KW/IPs. ALL 10 TESTS PASSED.
passed_tests: 1. Customer/Opp pill auto-sizing: Both inputs stacked in flex-col container, widths auto-adjust based on content length - PASS
2. DC grid-cols-2 layout: Added NYC and London, verified grid-cols-2 gap-1.5 mb-2 class - PASS
3. Site grid-cols-2 layout: Added Branch site, verified grid-cols-2 gap-1.5 mb-2 class - PASS
4. Summary bar DC/Site mini-pills: Shows pills with Building2/MapPin icons, names, and KW values (NYC500, London300, Branch200) - PASS
5. Summary bar target solution badges: NIOS (green), UDDI (blue), Security (red), Asset (purple) badges with colored backgrounds - PASS
6. Summary bar KW/IP values: Shows 'KW [total]' and '[count] IPs' in header - PASS
7. Collapsed state: Header click collapses inputs, summary bar remains visible with all DC/Site pills, target badges, KW/IPs - PASS
8. Deployment toggles: NIOS, UDDI, Security, Asset, Hybrid all toggle correctly; Hybrid badge appears when NIOS+UDDI active - PASS
9. IP Calculator: KW input, multiplier up/down arrows (2.5→3→2.5), real-time IP calculation - PASS
10. Delete DC/Site: X buttons on pills remove them correctly, count decreases - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Customer/Opp pill uses flex flex-col gap-0 with dynamic input widths via inline style
DC/Site pills use grid grid-cols-2 gap-1.5 mb-2 - correct 2-column layout
Summary bar in header row always visible, shows real data not counts
DC mini-pills: green Building2 icon + name + KW value
Site mini-pills: purple MapPin icon + name + KW value
Target solution badges use colored backgrounds matching button colors (NIOS #30d158, UDDI #0a84ff, Security #ff453a, Asset #bf5af2)
Hybrid badge shows gradient from-[#30d158] to-[#0a84ff] when both NIOS and UDDI active
Grid layout 5fr 5fr 3fr 3fr gives DC/Sites larger columns (5fr each) and Target Solutions/Active IPs equal smaller columns (3fr each)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TopBar refinements verified working. Key features: (1) Customer/Opp inputs stacked vertically in auto-sizing pill, (2) DC/Site pills use grid-cols-2 for 2-column legible layout, (3) Summary bar shows actual DC/Site mini-pills with names+KW, active target solution badges with colors, Hybrid badge when NIOS+UDDI, and KW/IP totals. Summary bar visible in both expanded and collapsed states. Target Solutions and Active IPs columns are equal width (3fr each).

customer_opp_auto_sizing.container_classes: flex flex-col gap-0 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg bg-[#2c2c2e] border border-[#3c3c3e]

dc_site_grid_layout.behavior: 2 pills per row, expands naturally into multiple rows

summary_bar_mini_pills.dc_pills: green Building2 icon + name + KW value (rgba(48, 209, 88, 0.15) bg)
summary_bar_mini_pills.site_pills: purple MapPin icon + name + KW value (rgba(94, 92, 230, 0.15) bg)

target_solution_badges.hybrid_badge: gradient from-[#30d158] to-[#0a84ff] with cyan text
